calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Jul-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The matter is continued to Jul-13-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204. The court will not be issuing an Order to Appear.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To Apr-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called for hearing regarding the status of close of estate. No appearance was made by any party or counsel.

The Court stated it had been notified that counsel was unable to attend the hearing due to a medical emergency. The matter was continued to April 27, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
